policy: Only recordings with an explicit reusable licence are served locally. A null audio src is either original browser synthesis or a reference-only item that must not be downloaded or re-hosted. No YouTube extraction or unlicensed substitution is permitted.
rightsSeparation: MIT applies to source code only. Each media/content item retains the terms recorded in CREDITS.md and public/media/audio-manifest.json; community cultural rights are not relicensed by the code licence.

runtimeAudio.implementation: Synthesized in-browser by MIT-licensed generator code with no external samples.
runtimeAudio.culturalBoundary: Modern neutral sound design only; not heritage music, ritual sound, a community field recording, or a claim about craft technique.

servedAssets.visualScope: Fictional pixel train interior, ticket conductor, abstract landscape and five-stop route; no ritual reconstruction or specific heritage performance
servedAssets.rightsNote: Project-generated content asset; not covered by the code-only MIT licence and not an artisan endorsement.

servedAssets.creator: Vyacheslav Argenberg
servedAssets.transformation: Recomposed as a wide 2D pixel-art railway landscape; palette, time of day, detail and composition changed.

servedAssets.creator: Vyacheslav Argenberg
servedAssets.transformation: Recomposed as a side-view pixel-art coastal transit background; scenery, palette, detail and layout changed for a fictional journey transition.
servedAssets.historicalBoundary: Interpretive game background only; not documentary imagery or an exact reconstruction of the terrain or railway alignment.

servedAssets.creator: Emilio Labrador
servedAssets.transformation: Redrawn as a transparent side-view pixel sprite, simplified and combined with three fictional heritage coaches; logos and operating marks omitted.

servedAssets.creator: Emilio Labrador
servedAssets.derivationContext: Generated in the project's pixel style through the heritage-express asset chain, whose openly licensed source is Train passing Lang Co.
servedAssets.transformation: Created as a transparent, straight side-view rail layer for the fictional train animation.
servedAssets.historicalBoundary: Animation graphic only; not a historical reconstruction or a technically exact railway depiction.

servedAssets.creator: Dragfyre
servedAssets.transformation: Redrawn as a fictional first-person 2D pixel carriage while retaining only broad real-world seat, curtain and aisle proportions.

servedAssets.creator: anjči
servedAssets.referenceScope: Broad historical uniform and onboard-service context only; the source subject is not described or represented as a ticket inspector.
servedAssets.transformation: Created as a fictional pixel character with a generic new face; service cart, food, logos and identifying marks omitted.
servedAssets.rightsNote: The referenced uniform may be outdated. No endorsement by the photographed person, creator, railway operator or Wikimedia Commons is implied.

servedAssets.scope: Local recording, six synthesized ambient presets, two interpretive foley presets, and reference-only pending-rights items

servedAssets.creator: Sound Futures
servedAssets.transformation: 22-second excerpt beginning approximately 8 seconds into the source; audio transcoded to Opus in an Ogg container
servedAssets.culturalReview: Source and reuse licence verified; project-level community review still required before on-site release.
